title: Create: More Recipes Addon
description: This mod adds more recipes to the create mod.
body:
In this mod there are a variety of new recipes for the Create Mod. You can make coal from charcoal, you can also make netherack and many other decorative blocks. Place four pieces of charcoal in the crafting grid to make a piece of coal, or put four pieces of charcoal in a Mechanical Press to do the same.

Some new recipes include:

Crafting Coal from Charcoal:

![Crafting coal from charcoal in crafting table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5eda22eb7d722b3ad7d2efd4d208cafa0bb1d9b.png)

and Pressing Charcoal into coal:

![Crafting coal from charcoal in presser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e3828d8dc914ead297227dc473866c583d3315e.png)
